title: Minecraft Bedrock Voxel Shape 1.21.110
description: A voxel shape definition for a behavior pack.

minecraft:voxel_shape.title: Voxel Shape Definition
minecraft:voxel_shape.description: Defines a voxel shape using axis-aligned bounding boxes for face culling.

identifier.description: Identifier for the voxel shape, in namespace:name format.

shape.title: Shape
shape.description: The shape definition containing bounding boxes.

boxes.description: Array of up to 32 axis-aligned bounding boxes that define the shape.

items.title: Bounding Box
items.description: An axis-aligned bounding box defined by minimum and maximum corners.

min.description: Minimum corner coordinates (x, y, z) in pixels. Must be less than max for each axis.

max.description: Maximum corner coordinates (x, y, z) in pixels. Must be greater than min for each axis.
